creator: bdheeman@gmail.com
text:
On 07/19/2009 08:41 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/yate-devel,
>
> Please note that PR ports/136907 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/136907
>   

Yes, I agree and shall take care of any compatibility issues.

BTW, is it possible for you to move this port 'net/yate-devel' to a
stable 'net/yate' and replace the 'net/yate-devel' with a fresh/new one;
a shar file is available for this at
http://cto.homelinux.net/pub/FreeBSD/ports/yate-devel.shar.gz

Please check http://cto.homelinux.net/ports?port=yate-devel for further
details or let me know if need to submit a new PR in this regard.

-- 
Balwinder S "bdheeman" Dheeman
Home: http://werc.homelinux.net/
